title: Coelogyne benguetensis
taxonomy: Coelogyne benguetensis is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This epiphytic orchid belongs to the genus Coelogyne, which comprises a large number of species. Within the genus, Coelogyne benguetensis is further grouped based on its characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. As a species of the Coelogyne genus, it shares similarities with other Coelogyne species. The exact classification of Coelogyne benguetensis at the species level is still a matter of ongoing research and study.
uses: Coelogyne benguetensis is a species of orchid, and like many plants in the genus, it has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. benefits: Coelogyne benguetensis is a type of orchid species that has been found to possess various health benefits due to its unique properties.
